channel.title: britney wang on britney-wang
channel.description: Recent content in britney wang on britney-wang

item.title: Bookshelf
item.description:
Go

  • Learning Go
  • Powerful Command-Line Applications in Go
  • 100 Go Mistakes and How to Avoid Them
  • Concurrency in Go

Software Engineering

  • The Pragmatic Programmer
  • Designing Data-Intensive Applications
  • Tidy First
  • Street Coder

Python

  • Python Testing with pytest

Rust

  • Zero To Production in Rust

item.title: Bauer
item.description:
Bauer parses Google document suggestions, creates a LLM-readable file with instructions and actionable suggestions, then generates a PR automatically through Copilot CLI.

Tech stack: Go, Copilot CLI, GitHub CLI, Google API

item.title: Meowatch
item.description:
Meowatch is a cat monitoring system built with Raspberry Pi 4 and Camera Module 3. It is an application that serves live stream video content that includes cat-specific features such as identifying individual cats and detecting its behaviours.

It is accessible through an online dashboard and also provides a summary of the cats’ activities.

Tech stack: Go, Hugo

item.title: Portfolio 2.0
item.description:
This project is the current portfolio website you’re seeing.

It is inspired by my interest in Go, which led me to Hugo

I came across Hugo while reading Powerful Command-Line Applications in Go and Learning Go

It is built with the Console Theme

Tech stack: Hugo, Vercel

item.title: Cookie Policy
item.description:
This project contains a script and stylesheet that displays the Canonical cookie policy banner across all websites.

Published on npm

Tech stack: Javascript, HTML, SCSS

item.title: Directory Parser
item.description:
Directory parser is a flask extension that parses websites and extracts structured data to build sitemaps dynamically.

Published on PyPI

Tech stack: Flask, Python

item.title: Michael Scott GPT-3
item.description:
Michael Scott is a character played in a comedy show, The Office. This chat bot simulates Michael’s responses with the use of GPT-3. It is accesible both via a web app and Chrome extension.

Tech stack: React, Next, Javascript, GPT-3

item.title: Curify
item.description:
Curify is a web application that personally curates Netflix watch list based on user’s Spotify playlist.

Tech stack: ReactJS, Spotify API, Figma, Railway

item.title: Portfolio 1.0
item.description:
This is an archived portfolio website that displayed current and existing work.

It displayed full-stack web skills, projects worked on and contact details.

Tech stack: React, Javascript, Vercel, MaterialUI

item.title: Ads Decoder
item.description:
Ads Decoder: Generating Symbolic Bounding Boxes and Labels for the given Images and Descriptors

This project focuses on combining the image features with the text descriptor and predict the symbolic regions with labels that draws the audience’s attention. The idea of combining text embeddings with image features extracted by the image classifier is inspired from the VQA model.

Tech stack: Python, PyTorch (Faster R-CNN), scikit-learn, Gensim/TextBlob, pycocotools, Conda, SLURM (HPC/MASSIVE M3)

item.title: Intrepidus
item.description:
Intrepidus is the optimal companion for an astronaut in space.

Simply enter details like whether you are a morning or night person, the times you will dock and undock at the International Space Station, and your console shifts and Intrepidus will generate a personalised sleep schedule, meal plans and daily exercise plans for you in seconds!

deep sleep in deep space, our submission for NASA Space Apps 2020

Tech stack: Flutter, Dart, Firebase

item.title: Associate Software Engineer @ Canonical
item.description:
• Implemented dark theme components, integrated on Ubuntu Pro Support Portal for dual theme support
  • Upstreamed themed components on the Vanilla Framework
  • Added support ticket and comment features through SalesForce API and Chatter

item.title: Developer Intern @ Configura
item.description:
• Developed a constraint-solver algorithm with linear programming practices to improve CET Designer’s UI/UX using in-house language, Configura Magick (CM)
  • Collaborated with the QA team to complete on-call tasks and regression testing on CET minor build versions using Jira and Test Rails

item.title: Software Engineer I @ Canonical
item.description:
• Shipped open source tools i.e directory parser, cookie policy that are used across Sites
  • Automated testing for Python, Javascript and Marketo forms to reduce lead loss
  • Implemented CI/CD automation with GitHub Actions including automated sitemap generation and form generator
  • Integrated TIOBE index tracking for codebase quality monitoring
  • Developed Jinja2 macro-based templating system to improve DevX on page creation
  • Mentored junior engineers on development best practices
  • Chair of Social Working Group, organising programmes that support team cohesion and social impact across 60+ distributed team members
  • 3x Recognition Award recipient

item.title: Software Engineer Intern @ PostCo
item.description:
• Developed features to the existing web application checkout page using React, TypeScript and Ruby on Rails
  • Collaborated with the Operations team to query Darkstores orders with SQL and Airtable
